name: Shrimp or Crabmeat Mousse
recipeIngredient: 2 cups crabmeat or shrimp or 1 cup of each
1 1/2 tablespoons chopped green bell pepper, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve lemon gelatin in boiling water.
2. When the mixture is partially congealed, add all ingredients except salad greens and blend thoroughly.
3. Pour into a mold.
4. Allow to firm up completely.
5. Unmold onto salad greens.
6. Serve with asparagus spears or green peas and heated rolls.
7. Serves 4-6 people.
